---
id: get-a-shared-project-by-share-token
title: "Get a shared project by share token"
description: "No authentication required. Share tokens are generated via `POST /admin/projects/{id}/share`."
sidebar_label: "Get a shared project by share token"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "get api-method"
info_path: docs/api/meridianjs-api
custom_edit_url: null
---

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get a shared project by share token"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/public/share/{token}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



No authentication required. Share tokens are generated via `POST /admin/projects/{id}/share`.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
